author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Decision: Writing vec4 variants as separate PTX constants (ADD_VEC4_PTX etc.) that process 4 elements per thread using ld.global.v4.f32 / st.global.v4.f32. The existing try_launch_binary/unary helpers will try the vec4 kernel first when n is divisible by 4, falling back to the scalar kernel for the remainder or when n is small.
